message:
Refine README copy for clarity and tone

- Update AI tool references to be more specific (Claude Code, Codex, Cursor)
- Soften language: "costs" -> "could cost" for accuracy
- Remove overly casual ending line
- Adjust heading: "Love" -> "Will Love" (more professional)
- Remove ROI calculation section (too sales-y)

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
